sourcesContent:
// All UI text for English, French, and Arabic
// Arabic uses RTL direction — set on <html dir="rtl"> when lang === 'ar'

const translations = {
  en: {
    dir: 'ltr',
    // Hero
    celebrationOfLove: 'A Celebration of Love',
    heroDate: 'July 12, 2026 · Sned, Gafsa · Tunisia',
    // Nav tabs
    tabs: {
      overview:  'Overview',
      countdown: 'Countdown',
      music:     '♪ Music',
      venue:     '📍 Venue',
      schedule:  'Schedule',
      photos:    'Photos',
      memories:  'Memories',
      wishes:    '💕 Wishes',
      guests:    'Guests',
    },
    // Overview
    ourStory: 'Our',
    ourStoryEm: 'Story',
    twoHearts: 'Two hearts, one journey',
    locationMain: 'Sned, Gafsa — Tunisia',
    locationSub: 'A celebration rooted in the heart of the south',
    quote: '"Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favourite."',
    quoteAttr: '— Safwen & Joumana',
    letterFrom: 'A letter from Safwen',
    letterSalutation: 'Dear Joumana,',
    letterText: 'From the moment I met you, I knew you were the one I wanted to walk through life with. Every laugh, every tear, every ordinary Tuesday — I want to share them all with you.',
    letterClosing: 'Forever yours,',
    letterSignature: 'Safwen 💕',
    details: {
      weddingDate: 'Wedding Date',
      weddingDateVal: 'Sunday, July 12, 2026',
      location: 'Location',
      locationVal: 'Sned, Gafsa, Tunisia',
      region: 'Region',
      regionVal: 'Gafsa Governorate, Southwest Tunisia',
      ceremonyStyle: 'Ceremony Style',
      ceremonyStyleVal: 'Traditional Tunisian Celebration',
      weddingColors: 'Wedding Colors',
      weddingColorsVal: 'Ivory, Gold & Blush Rose',
      season: 'Season',
      seasonVal: 'Summer — warm July nights in Gafsa',
      madeBy: 'Made with love by',
      madeByVal: "Safwen's brother 💛",
    },
    // Countdown
    theCountdown: 'The',
    theCountdownEm: 'Countdown',
    everySecond: 'Every second brings us closer',
    daysUntil: 'Days Until the Wedding',
    todayIsTheDay: 'Today is the Day!',
    days: 'Days',
